title: Effect of sublethal treatments of imidacloprid against Aromia bungii on its parasitoid Sclerodermus guani
author: Li, Shuang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Aromia bungii Faldermann adults We first determined appropriate sublethal doses of imidacloprid against A. bungii by bioassay. We then quantified feeding and biomass of A. bungii larvae feeding on artificial diet treated with sublethal doses of imidacloprid. CAT Enzymatic activity Determination of CAT enzyme activity changes in the A. bungii larvae after feeding on artificial diet treated with sublethal doses of imidacloprid. POD Enzymatic activity Determination of POD enzyme activity changes in the A. bungii larvae after feeding on artificial diet treated with sublethal doses of imidacloprid. SOD Enzymatic activity Determination of SOD enzyme activity changes in the A. bungii larvae after feeding on artificial diet treated with sublethal doses of imidacloprid. CarE Enzymatic activity Determination of CarE enzyme activity changes in the A. bungii larvae after feeding on artificial diet treated with sublethal doses of imidacloprid. GST Enzymatic activity Determination of GST enzyme activity changes in the A. bungii larvae after feeding on artificial diet treated with sublethal doses of imidacloprid. Sclerodermus guani We determined how larvae fed with sublethal doses of imidacloprid affected the performance of S. guani . Include the emergence rate、maternal fecundity、parasitic success rate.
